seoTitle: Mawson Lakes vs Mayfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mawson Lakes and Mayfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mawson Lakes vs Mayfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mawson Lakes and Mayfield.
heading: Mawson Lakes vs Mayfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mawson Lakes, South Australia and Mayfield, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mayfield has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Mawson Lakes (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mawson Lakes or Mayfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mawson Lakes has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Mayfield scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mawson Lakes scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Mayfield scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mawson Lakes or Mayfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mayfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
